Factiva source-GROUP dimension (user-confirmed). NOT a source<->group bridge like Athena: group membership lives in CDB_SOURCE_DOCS_CURRENT.SRCINFO_GROUPS_GROUP (comma-delimited) + SRCINFO_REGIONOFORIGINS_REGIONOFORIGIN. Reconstruct flags via token test (TDJP/TTANK) and country via SPLIT_TO_TABLE join to ROO-type groups (GROUPINFO_GROUPTYPECODE_CODE_VALUE='ROO', code->GROUPINFO_CODE_VALUE, name->GROUPINFO_GROUPNAME). Replaces old full_roo_table whitelist. Used by Deloitte Source Usage

Behavioral user-seg (user-confirmed 6mo substitute for 12mo; window differs). eid->PIB_MEMBER_ID, cluster_name->CLUSTER_NAME, page-view/pct cols renamed (TOTAL_FACTIVA_DESKTOP_PAGE_VIEWS etc; pct cols are TEXT->try_cast). No nqa_pct/newspage_pct/flipboard_pct equiv (NULL, unused). cycle_date->SOURCE_FILE_PARTITION_DATE. Used by Deloitte Source Usage

Factiva content source (static-CSV upload; CDB is the live superset, 123 verbose cols). Value-verified col map: sourcecode->SRCINFO_CODE_VALUE (join key); sourcetype->DOCDATA_SOURCETYPE_VALUE; sourcename->SRCINFO_SOURCENAME; ipname->IPPUBINFO_IP_NAME; language->SRCINFO_LANGN; status->SRCINFO_STATUSCODE_CODE_VALUE; ipcode->IPPUBINFO_IP_CODE_VALUE; royalty_provider_code->BILLINGDIST_ROYALTYPROVIDER_CODE_VALUE; billing_group_code->BILLINGDIST_BILLGROUP_CODE_VALUE; billing_group_name->BILLINGDIST_BILLGROUP_NAME; sourcecoverage->SRCINFO_COVERAGE_VALUE; firstissueonline->SRCINFO_FIRSTISSUEDATE_VALUE; onlinedate->SRCINFO_ONLINEDATE_VALUE; maxlag->SRCINFO_MAXLAG_VALUE; minlag->SRCINFO_MINLAG_VALUE; rightscode->IPPUBINFO_SRCRIGHTSTYPE_CODE_VALUE; embargohours->BILLINGDIST_EMBARGOHOURS_VALUE; embargodays->BILLINGDIST_EMBARGODAYS_VALUE; expirationhours->BILLINGDIST_EXPIRATIONHOURS_VALUE; expirationdays->BILLINGDIST_EXPIRATIONDAYS_VALUE; pst->IPPUBINFO_SRCPRIMARYTYPE_DESCRIPTION; priority_band->SRCINFO_SRCPRIORITY_VALUE; autotranslate->IPPUBINFO_ALLOWTRANSLATION_VALUE; description->SRCINFO_DESCRIPTION. Gaps: articlecoverage->CASE on SRCINFO_ARTICLETYPE_VALUE (fulltext->FUT/abstract->ABT); onlineavailability->NULL (no CDB counterpart; its only use was a no-op '%Russia%' filter, 0/77233 rows). Only sourcecode/sourcename/sourcetype/ipname used in worksheets; rest are metadata mirror.
